scripts.start:two: concurrently 'PORT=34431 bun run src/runner.ts' 'PORT=34432 bun run src/runner.ts'
scripts.start:http-buggy: concurrently 'HOST=localhost PORT=34431 bun run src/runner-http-buggy.ts' 'HOST=localhost PORT=34432 bun run src/runner-http-buggy.ts'
scripts.start:http-patched: concurrently 'HOST=localhost PORT=34431 bun run src/runner-http-patched.ts' 'HOST=localhost PORT=34432 bun run src/runner-http-patched.ts'
scripts.db:clean: docker compose exec postgres psql -U postgres -d cluster_test -c 'TRUNCATE cluster_runners, cluster_messages, cluster_replies, cluster_locks;'
